memoryArtifacts.description:

Born: 1385 in Duart, Isle of Mull, Scotland
He had an illegitimate son by unknown mother, by the name of Donald MacLean "The Hunter", 1st. La …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Janetta Stewart Lady Duart於1402年8月15日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar27歲，母親Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar42歲。她於1430年與Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年11月11日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特德華爾特 卡素享年83歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janetta Stewart Lady Duart于1402年8月15日出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar27岁，母亲Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar42岁。她于1430年与Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年11月11日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特德華爾特 卡素享年83岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Grzegorz, Irena, Lucyna, Witold.

Polish (mainly Łada) and Czech (Moravian): from a short form of the Polish personal name Ładysław, Czech Ladislav, both from Vladislav (Latinized as Ladislaus), a Slavic name composed of the elements vlad ‘to rule’ (from Old Slavic vlasti, later vladati) + slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from slava ‘glory’). Compare 2 below.
Hungarian: from Lad(a), a short form of the personal name Ladomér, a Hungarian form of Slavic Vladimir (see Lado 2, compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Duart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Juan, Jorge, Luis, Ruben, Francisco, Miguel, Raul, Pedro.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Agostinho, Henrique, Paulo, Albano, Almir, Anabela, Ilidio, Ligia, Marcio, Margarida.
Portuguese: from the personal name Duarte, a Portuguese name of uncertain origin taken to be the equivalent of Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: English and Welsh: from the Middle English personal name Edward (Old English Ēadweard, from ēad ‘prosperity, fortune’ + w(e)ard ‘guard, ward’). The popularity of the personal name was largely due to its being the name of the sainted Anglo-Saxon king Edward the Confessor and of three kings in the 13th–14th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Janetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Janet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Stuart  , less common as a given name, although more common as a surname.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: From the French version of the surname Stewart. This form was introduced to Scotland in the 16th century by Mary Stuart , Queen of Scots, who was brought up in France. The surname originated as an occupational or status name for someone who served as a steward in a manor or royal household. The Scottish royal family of this name are traditionally supposed to be descended from a family who were hereditary stewards in Brittany before the Conquest. Use as a given name originated in Scotland, but is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Janetta Stewart Lady Duart was born on 15 August 1402, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar, was 27 and her mother, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, was 42. She married Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean in 1430, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 November 1485, in Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janetta Stewart Lady Duart est née le 15 août 1402, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean en 1430, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1485, à Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janetta Stewart Lady Duart am 15. August 1402 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar 42. Sie hat 1430 in Argyll, Scotland Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. November 1485 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janetta Stewart Lady Duart è nata il il 15 agosto 1402 nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean nel 1430, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1485, nel Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janetta Stewart Lady Duartが1402年8月15日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Marは27歳，母Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Marは42歳であった。1430年にスコットランドアルグイルでLachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLeanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年11月11日にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトダアルト カストルで83歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀

ko.lifeSummary: Janetta Stewart Lady Duart(이)가 1402년 8월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1430년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 11월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janetta Stewart Lady Duart nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1402, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean em 1430, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1485, em Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scot: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janetta Stewart Lady Duart родилась 15 августа 1402 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean в 1430 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 ноября 1485 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janetta Stewart Lady Duart nació el 15 de agosto de 1402, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Stewart 12th Earl of Mar, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean en 1430, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1485, en Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.
